topic_angle: 학사경고 받던 내가 AI 5개 활용해서 A+ 받은 5가지 비결
essence_5: 각 AI(Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude/NotebookLM)에 지침으로 나·과제·전공 컨텍스트 학습시키고 모든 질문·과제에 활용
수업 중 Gemini Live로 강의 실시간 받아쓰기 — 9시 1교시 졸려도 시험기간 백지 안 됨
시험 D-3 NotebookLM으로 족보 없이 객관식 20 + 서술형 5 예상문제 자동 생성
리포트 초안 Claude Project로 내 글 스타일 학습 → 교수 시각 첨삭 시뮬레이션 2회 반복
과제 마감 직전 NotebookLM에 강의자료 25개 박고 핵심 요약 + 인용 출처 자동 생성
rationale: recent 7일에 portrait·movie_poster·landscape 다 소진됨 → minimal_typography로 nene candid 톤(자연광 일상 사진 + 큰 한글 텍스트 박스 60%) 정합. accent는 recent 4색(#3B6E47·#1A1A2E·#FFEB3B) 모두 회피한 따뜻한 오렌지 #FF6B35 — 학사경고 탈출의 "반등·온기" 감정과 매칭되면서 fit_ai.founder 친근 톤과 일치.

slides.headline: 학사경고 탈출 — AI 5개로 A+ 받은 비결
slides.subtext: 학점 바닥 찍은 내가 직접 써본 5가지 루틴
slides.label: 학점 반등 실험 기록
slides.prompt:
Slide 1 message: "학사경고 탈출 — AI 5개로 A+ 받은 비결" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학교 캠퍼스 봄 오후, 학생 책상 위에 너덜너덜한 성적표 한 장과 그 위에 빨간 펜으로 동그라미 친 'A+' 한 칸이 자연광 아래 놓인 candid 장면. 바닥(학사경고)에서 위(A+)로 올라온 시각적 대비.

Scene: A Korean university dormitory desk by a window in late spring afternoon, captured candidly on a smartphone from a slightly tilted overhead angle. On the desk: a wrinkled paper transcript half-folded, a few course rows visible with handwritten red pen circling one cell that reads "A+". Beside it: an open laptop with screen dimmed (not the focus), a half-empty Americano in a transparent plastic cup, a yellow highlighter, and a single dried cherry blossom petal landed near the paper. Through the window in soft focus: a Korean campus building and bare branches with new green buds. Worn texture on paper, real coffee ring stain on the desk corner.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (4 PM spring soft warm) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean university dorm/study scene · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft afternoon daylight from window-left at 30° elevation, gentle warm fill, no flash, slight shadow under transcript edge
- camera angle: slight overhead 70° looking down at desk, handheld micro-tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (transcript on left-center, coffee cup right-third), negative space upper area reserved for headline text box
- mood: quiet relief, "드디어 올라왔다" intimate recognition

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (red pen circle on A+, subtle highlight on petal), warm beige #F5F0E8 (paper and desk wood), muted gray #94A3B8 (laptop body soft focus), deep ink #1A1A1A (text box background for headline).

Display large hangul text "학사경고 탈출 — AI 5개로 A+ 받은 비결" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark ink rounded text box covering upper 55% of the frame, white text, two lines. The character "A+" rendered slightly larger with #FF6B35 orange accent color. Subtext below in smaller weight white: "학점 바닥 찍은 내가 직접 써본 5가지 루틴". Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper fiber visible on transcript, real ballpoint pen ink texture on the red circle (not vector clean), coffee cup condensation droplets, cherry blossom petal soft pink-white realistic.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle signature area, ~120px square). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). text box dominant upper 55%, photo as supporting context lower 45%. Number "5" in headline must match the actual 5 tips in the carousel.

No text other than the hangul headline and subtext specified. No external account handles. No watermarks. No AI tool logos. No floating UI elements. No glow effects. No floating particles.

slides.headline: AI마다 나·전공·과제 먼저 학습시키기
slides.subtext: Claude·Gemini·GPT, 쓰기 전 컨텍스트 박으면 답변 톤이 달라져요
slides.label: 비결 1 · 컨텍스트 세팅
slides.prompt:
Slide 2 message: "AI마다 나·전공·과제 먼저 학습시키기" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생 책상 위, 작은 종이 메모 3장이 나란히 놓여 있고 각각 'Claude' 'Gemini' 'GPT'라 손글씨로 적힌 채 자기소개·전공·과제 정보가 채워지는 candid scene. 도구마다 별도 컨텍스트를 박는다는 메시지를 종이 3장 분할로 시각화.

Scene: A Korean student's wooden study desk, captured candidly. Three small sticky notes or index cards laid out side-by-side under a desk lamp's natural-feel light (no harsh glow). Each card has handwritten Korean header: leftmost "Claude" with bullet points like "전공: 경영학" "학년: 3학년" "글 스타일: 솔직체"; middle card "Gemini" with similar bullets; right card "GPT" with similar bullets. A black ballpoint pen rests across the middle card. Faint laptop edge visible upper-right corner showing a generic chat interface (out of focus, not branded logos). Eraser shavings and a coffee ring add lived-in feel.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight mixed with warm desk lamp · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key overhead framing · everyday Korean student desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm natural mix (window backlight + desk lamp 3200K), even soft, no specular highlights
- camera angle: top-down 85° flat lay, slight handheld micro-rotation
- composition: three-card horizontal row using rule of thirds vertically, leading lines from pen direction guide eye left to right
- mood: focused-organized, "준비 단계의 안정감"

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (subtle on Claude card header underline), warm cream #F5F0E8 (paper cards), warm wood #C8A47C (desk), ink black #1A1A1A (handwriting and text box).

Display large hangul text "AI마다 나·전공·과제 먼저 학습시키기" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a white rounded text box covering upper 50% of the frame, black text, with the word "학습" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange. Subtext below in smaller weight dark gray: "Claude·Gemini·GPT, 쓰기 전 컨텍스트 박으면 답변 톤이 달라져요". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "비결 1 · 컨텍스트 세팅" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper fiber and slight curl on sticky notes, real handwritten ink (not perfectly clean vector), pen has subtle scratch on plastic body, desk wood grain visible.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area, ~120px square). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). text box dominant upper 50%, photo lower 50%.

No text other than specified hangul. No external account handles. No real Claude/Gemini/GPT branded logos visible — only handwritten tool names on cards. No floating UI. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 9시 1교시 졸려도 Gemini Live로 받아쓰는 법
slides.subtext: 실시간 강의 텍스트화 — 시험기간 백지 방어 루틴이에요
slides.label: 비결 2 · 강의 자동기록
slides.prompt:
Slide 3 message: "9시 1교시 졸려도 Gemini Live로 받아쓰는 법" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학교 강의실 아침 9시, 학생 책상 위에 스마트폰이 비스듬히 세워져 Gemini Live 받아쓰기 화면이 켜진 candid scene. 옆에 펜만 살짝 놓인 노트 — 학생이 굳이 적지 않아도 폰이 다 받아쓴다는 메시지.

Scene: A Korean university lecture hall morning at 9 AM, captured candidly from student-seat POV. Foreground: a slightly worn paper notebook open and mostly blank with just a date "5월 12일" written in upper corner, a ballpoint pen lying across it untouched. To the right of the notebook, a smartphone propped against a pencil case at 15° angle, screen on, showing a realistic Gemini Live transcription UI — a simple white interface with scrolling Korean text fragments like "오늘 수업의 핵심은…" appearing in real-time, a small live audio waveform at the top, the iconic 4-point Gemini diamond star icon visible in the corner. Background slightly blurred: rows of wooden lecture chairs, large window left with morning daylight, a few other students' shoulders out of focus.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (early morning 9 AM cool-warm mix) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing from student's perspective · everyday Korean university lecture hall · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: morning natural daylight from window-left at 35° elevation, cool ambient with warm desk-touch, no flash
- camera angle: eye-level from student's seated POV looking down-forward, slight 12° tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (notebook left-bottom, phone right-third), leading lines from desk edge to background chairs
- mood: relatable-quiet, "이게 나야" recognition, slightly drowsy morning

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (subtle warm glow on notebook page edge from morning sun), neutral wood #C8A47C (desk), cool gray #94A3B8 (background chairs soft focus), white #FAFAFA (phone Gemini Live UI), text box dark #1A1A1A.

Display large hangul text "9시 1교시 졸려도 Gemini Live로 받아쓰는 법" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark text box covering upper 55% of the frame, white text, with the word "받아쓰기" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange. Subtext below in smaller weight light gray: "실시간 강의 텍스트화 — 시험기간 백지 방어 루틴이에요". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "비결 2 · 강의 자동기록" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Sub-CTA tiny gray text bottom-left photo area: "이 슬라이드는 캡쳐 추천". Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper notebook fiber, phone screen has natural slight reflection (not glossy CGI), phone bezel looks like real iPhone, dust motes faintly in morning beam (natural — not AI sparkle).

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip).

No text other than specified hangul + the in-screen Korean transcription fragments. No external account handles. Only legitimate Gemini Live UI on phone — no other AI logos. No floating UI outside the phone screen. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 족보 없어도 NotebookLM이 예상문제 25개 뽑아주는 법
slides.subtext: 시험 D-3, 객관식 20 + 서술형 5 자동 생성해봤거든
slides.label: 비결 3 · 예상문제 자동화
slides.prompt:
Slide 4 message: "족보 없어도 NotebookLM이 예상문제 25개 뽑아주는 법" → visual metaphor: 시험 D-3 새벽 카페, 노트북 화면에 NotebookLM이 출력한 예상문제 리스트가 보이고 옆에 출력해서 손으로 번호 매긴 인쇄물 — 족보 대신 AI가 25개를 뽑아준 candid scene.

Scene: A Korean 24-hour cafe table at midnight or early dawn, captured candidly. On the table: an open laptop angled toward camera at ~70°, screen displaying a clean NotebookLM-style interface with a list of numbered Korean exam questions — "1. 다음 중 옳은 것은?" "2. ~의 정의를 서술하시오." up to a glimpse of "25." Beside the laptop, a stack of printed A4 sheets with the same questions, hand-numbered with red pen "D-3" written in the margin, a yellow highlighter, an Americano, eraser. Background soft focus: cafe window with night Seoul street lights faintly visible, an empty chair across.

medium: smartphone candid · ambient cafe natural-warm light (not cinematic) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key over-shoulder framing · everyday Korean late-night cafe scene · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm cafe pendant light from above at 60° elevation, mild laptop screen glow on subject, dim ambient — not dramatic
- camera angle: over-shoulder 45° behind laptop screen, slight handheld tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (laptop screen left-center, printed sheets right-third), leading lines from paper edges to laptop
- mood: focused-tired, "D-3 비상 모드" determination

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (red pen "D-3" notation and the number "25" highlight), warm cream #F5F0E8 (paper), deep wood #5C3A1E (cafe table), white #FAFAFA (NotebookLM UI background), text box dark #1A1A1A.

Display large hangul text "족보 없어도 NotebookLM이 예상문제 25개 뽑아주는 법" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark text box covering upper 55% of the frame, white text, with the number "25개" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange and slightly larger. Subtext below in smaller weight light gray: "시험 D-3, 객관식 20 + 서술형 5 자동 생성해봤거든". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "비결 3 · 예상문제 자동화" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper fiber on printouts, real red ballpoint ink texture, slight coffee stain ring, laptop screen has natural anti-glare matte (not glossy CGI), keyboard subtle wear.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip).

No text other than specified hangul + in-screen Korean question fragments. No external account handles. Only legitimate NotebookLM-style UI representation on laptop. No floating UI elements. No glow effects or particles.

slides.headline: 리포트 초안, Claude한테 교수 시각으로 첨삭받기
slides.subtext: 내 글 스타일 학습시킨 뒤 교수 시각 시뮬레이션 2회 돌렸어요
slides.label: 비결 4 · 리포트 첨삭
slides.prompt:
Slide 5 message: "리포트 초안, Claude한테 교수 시각으로 첨삭받기" → visual metaphor: 학생 책상에 출력한 리포트 초안과 그 위에 빨간 펜으로 첨삭 흔적(밑줄·동그라미·여백 코멘트)이 그어진 candid scene — Claude가 교수처럼 첨삭한 결과물을 종이로 시각화.

Scene: A Korean student's home desk in afternoon, captured candidly. Centered on the desk: a printed A4 report draft with Korean title visible at top "마케팅 전략 분석 — 중간 리포트". The page has red ballpoint pen marks throughout — underlines under several phrases, circled words, margin comments in handwritten Korean like "근거 부족" "문장 끊어" "여기 강함". Two pages stacked, the second one peeking out underneath with the same red corrections. To the upper-right of the report: a laptop edge visible with Claude chat interface partially shown (orange Anthropic accent recognizable, conversation about "교수 시각으로 첨삭 부탁"). A red ballpoint pen lying across the page diagonally.

medium: smartphone candid · natural afternoon daylight from window · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key overhead framing · everyday Korean home desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft natural daylight from window-right at 40° elevation, even soft ambient, no harsh shadow
- camera angle: top-down 80° flat lay, slight handheld tilt 8°
- composition: rule of thirds (paper centered-left, laptop right-third), red pen acts as leading line diagonal
- mood: focused-discovery, "이렇게 봐주는구나" small revelation

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (used selectively on the word "첨삭" in text box and a hint on the red pen — but the actual ink corrections lean true red #D32F2F for realism), paper cream #F5F0E8, dark wood #5C3A1E desk, text box #1A1A1A.

Display large hangul text "리포트 초안, Claude한테 교수 시각으로 첨삭받기" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark text box covering upper 55% of the frame, white text, with the word "첨삭" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange. Subtext below in smaller weight light gray: "내 글 스타일 학습시킨 뒤 교수 시각 시뮬레이션 2회 돌렸어요". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "비결 4 · 리포트 첨삭" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real ballpoint red ink (slightly uneven pressure, not vector clean), paper fiber visible, slight curl on page edge, laptop keyboard subtle reflection.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip).

No text other than specified hangul + the in-paper Korean report title and red corrections. No external account handles. Legitimate Claude UI representation only on laptop edge. No floating UI elements. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 강의자료 25개 NotebookLM에 박고 인용 출처까지 뽑기
slides.subtext: 과제 마감 직전에도 핵심 요약 + 출처 자동 생성 됐거든
slides.label: 비결 5 · 자료 요약 자동화
slides.prompt:
Slide 6 message: "강의자료 25개 NotebookLM에 박고 인용 출처까지 뽑기" → visual metaphor: 책상 위에 쌓인 PDF 인쇄물 25장 더미와 옆 노트북 화면의 NotebookLM 요약·출처 인용 화면 — 종이 더미가 한 화면으로 정리된 candid scene.

Scene: A Korean student's late-night desk near assignment deadline, captured candidly. Centered: a tall messy stack of A4 printouts (lecture PDF print-outs, visibly 20+ sheets) with sticky note tabs in yellow and pink peeking out. On top of the stack rests an open laptop showing a NotebookLM-style summary panel — a clean white interface with Korean text "핵심 요약" followed by 3 bullet points and a "인용 출처" section listing source numbers [1] [2] [3] linked to file names. Beside the stack: a digital clock showing late time like 02:47, a half-eaten convenience-store sandwich wrapper, and a coffee cup.

medium: smartphone candid · warm desk lamp + cool laptop screen ambient mix · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean dorm late-night assignment scene · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm desk lamp from upper-left at 55° elevation + cool laptop screen fill on stack, deep ambient shadow around edges, NOT dramatic
- camera angle: low three-quarter 25° elevation looking up slightly at the paper stack, handheld micro-tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (paper stack center-left, laptop screen upper-right), leading lines from sticky tabs guide eye to laptop summary
- mood: late-night-determined, "마감 직전인데 살았다" relief

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (subtle warm rim on top of paper stack from lamp + headline highlight), paper cream #F5F0E8 (stack), warm wood #C8A47C (desk), white #FAFAFA (laptop NotebookLM UI), dark navy #1A1A2E (text box and ambient shadow — used minimally so it doesn't clash with recent_colors guard since it's only the text background, not the dominant accent).

Display large hangul text "강의자료 25개 NotebookLM에 박고 인용 출처까지 뽑기" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark text box covering upper 55% of the frame, white text, with the word "인용" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange. Subtext below in smaller weight light gray: "과제 마감 직전에도 핵심 요약 + 출처 자동 생성 됐거든". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "비결 5 · 자료 요약 자동화" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Sub-CTA tiny gray text bottom-right photo area: "저장해두면 과제 때 도움". Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper edge wear visible on stack, sticky note slight curl, laptop screen anti-glare matte (not glossy CGI), sandwich wrapper subtle crinkle, real coffee cup condensation.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip).

No text other than specified hangul + in-screen Korean NotebookLM summary fragments. No external account handles. Only legitimate NotebookLM-style UI. No floating UI elements. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 학사경고→A+ — AI 루틴 5개 한 학기 실험 결과
slides.subtext: 5개 툴 조합으로 리포트·시험 동시 커버한 현장 기록이에요
slides.label: 실증 케이스 · 한 학기
slides.prompt:
Slide 7 message: "학사경고→A+ — AI 루틴 5개 한 학기 실험 결과" → visual metaphor: before/after 성적표 두 장이 책상 위에 나란히 놓인 candid scene — 왼쪽은 학사경고 학기(C·D·F 보임), 오른쪽은 A+ 다수 — 한 학기 실험의 결과를 종이 한 장으로 시각화.

Scene: A Korean student's desk in soft afternoon light, captured candidly from slightly above. Two transcript-style A4 papers laid side by side on a clean wooden desk. LEFT paper header reads "2024-1학기" with course rows showing grades like "C+", "D", "F" visible in the grade column — a faint red "학사경고" stamp in the corner. RIGHT paper header reads "2024-2학기" with course rows showing "A+", "A+", "A", "A+", "S" in the grade column. A red marker arrow drawn between them on the desk surface (or a sticky note arrow). To the side: a small notebook with handwritten Korean checklist "① 컨텍스트 세팅 ② Gemini Live ③ NotebookLM 25문제 ④ Claude 첨삭 ⑤ 출처 자동" — the 5 routines numbered. A pen.

medium: smartphone candid · natural afternoon daylight · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key overhead framing · everyday Korean home desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft natural daylight from window-front at 30° elevation, even soft ambient with gentle shadow under papers
- camera angle: top-down 85° flat lay, slight 5° handheld tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (two papers split left and right halves, leading line of red arrow between them), checklist notebook lower-third
- mood: quiet-proof, "실제로 이렇게 됐어" honest documentation

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (red arrow between papers and the word "A+" cells subtle highlight + headline word highlight), paper cream #F5F0E8, warm wood #C8A47C desk, ink #1A1A1A grades and handwriting, text box dark #1A1A1A.

Display large hangul text "학사경고→A+ — AI 루틴 5개 한 학기 실험 결과" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark text box covering upper 50% of the frame, white text, with the phrase "한 학기" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange. Subtext below in smaller weight light gray: "5개 툴 조합으로 리포트·시험 동시 커버한 현장 기록이에요". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "실증 케이스 · 한 학기" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real paper fiber and slight crease on transcripts, ballpoint pen ink uneven, handwriting natural (not vector), wood grain visible, slight dust speck on right paper (lived-in).

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). number of routines (5) in headline must match 5 carousel tips.

No text other than specified hangul + the in-paper Korean course/grade fragments. No external account handles. No real university logo. No AI tool logos visible. No floating UI elements. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 저장하고 이번 학기 바로 써봐
slides.subtext: 팔로우하고 댓글 남기면 컨텍스트 세팅 프롬프트 DM 보내줄게요
slides.label: 저장 · 팔로우 · DM
slides.prompt:
Slide 8 message: "저장하고 이번 학기 바로 써봐" → visual metaphor: 한국 20대 운영자의 작업공간 손 candid + 인스타그램 팔로우 버튼 mockup + 저장 북마크 + DM 화살표 3종이 자연스럽게 배치된 친근한 CTA scene — nene_weekly 마지막 슬라이드 패턴 추종.

Scene: A Korean 20-something creator's home desk in warm afternoon light, captured candidly. Foreground: a hand (visible from wrist, no face — friendly Korean 20s aesthetic, casual sweater sleeve) holding a smartphone tilted slightly toward camera. The smartphone screen shows an Instagram-style profile mockup: profile circle with cartoon-feel avatar (generic friendly silhouette, not a real face), account display name handwritten-feel "fit_ai.founder" small below, and a prominent rectangular "팔로우" button in #FF6B35 orange filled (white text "팔로우"). Below the follow button row, two small icons visible: a bookmark outline icon (save) and a paper-airplane DM/share icon, with tiny Korean labels "저장" and "DM". Background: warm wooden desk with an open notebook, a coffee cup, a small plant in soft focus — cozy candid not studio.

medium: smartphone candid · warm afternoon natural daylight · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing showing only hand + phone (no face) · everyday Korean creator home desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm natural daylight from window-right at 35° elevation, gentle key on hand and phone, soft ambient fill
- camera angle: 30° from front, slight handheld micro-tilt as if a friend is showing you their phone
- composition: rule of thirds (phone screen center-right with the follow/save/DM elements visible, hand leading from bottom-left), negative space upper-left for headline text box
- mood: warm-friendly, "같이 해보자" inviting close-friend tone

Color palette: accent #FF6B35 (follow button fill + save icon active state + headline highlight word), warm cream background #F5F0E8 (desk and ambient), white #FAFAFA (phone IG UI background), gentle wood #C8A47C, text box #1A1A1A.

Display large hangul text "저장하고 이번 학기 바로 써봐" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight 900 feeling) inside a dark text box covering upper 50% of the frame, white text, with the word "저장" highlighted in #FF6B35 orange. Subtext below in smaller weight light gray, two lines: "팔로우하고 댓글 남기면" / "컨텍스트 세팅 프롬프트 DM 보내줄게요". Small label tag upper-left of text box: "저장 · 팔로우 · DM" in white pill on #FF6B35 background. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

CTA visual mandatory 3종 all visible inside the phone screen mockup: (1) #FF6B35 filled "팔로우" button rectangle with white Korean text; (2) outlined bookmark icon with tiny "저장" label below; (3) paper-airplane share/DM icon with tiny "DM" label below. The three sit in a clean row or compact stack within the phone IG-style profile mockup.

Texture details: real hand skin texture (natural Korean 20s, casual not modelesque), sweater knit fiber visible at sleeve, phone screen subtle anti-glare reflection, wood grain on desk, plant leaf real soft focus.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean (handle area for wrapper signature). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip).

No text other than specified hangul + the in-screen "팔로우" "저장" "DM" labels + the small handwritten-feel "fit_ai.founder" account name on the mockup (this is OUR brand, not external). No external account handles (nene_weekly, ai_ainow, etc.) anywhere. No real face. No floating UI elements outside the phone. No glow effects. No neon. The follow button mockup must look like a believable Instagram UI element, not a flashy CTA banner.
